generated_comment: Bro if she knew he was married and still kept getting close, then obviously she's the one messing up that family. Aadmi also makes mistakes, but this type of girl knows exactly what she's doing, full serial wali homewrecker scene.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it assigns primary blame for an affair to the woman while minimizing the man's responsibility as merely 'making mistakes.' It encodes homewrecker framing, seductress logic, and blame asymmetry using serial-style cultural language.
original_frame: The Makeup Paradox: Unnatural Yet Expected
persona_text: You are Arjun. Age 23. Single. A college student in Bengaluru. You are in a WhatsApp group with seven male college friends. Someone has shared a meme that says women spend two hours putting on makeup and then get angry when men call them fake. You are reacting to the meme and adding your own comment about women who wear heavy makeup and what they are hiding and whether men have a right to know what a woman actually looks like before committing to a relationship.
